subject: [PATCH 6/9] sched_ext: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel to defer console output for certain warnings under rq->lock or ->pi_lock. The WARN*() calls are replaced with SCHED_WARN*() variants, which use irq_work to emit the console output asynchronously instead of synchronously. This change is intended to prevent deadlocks that can occur when a legacy or boot console is configured. The patch affects several functions in the kernel/sched/ext.c file and replaces 49 lines of code.
